chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 172 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Riaz Ali, Assistant, Survey Superintendent Office, Khairpur and Qurban Ali, Assistant Mukhtiarkar, New Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition for demarcation of his land bearing Survey No.257 (0-14 ghuntas), Deh Arain, Tapo Arain, Taluka New Sukkur, District Sukkur. Learned AAG submits that subject to all exceptions, payment of requisite fee through Challan, and notice to all parties with the help of SHO concerned, the demarcation would be conducted in accordance with law, and report would be submitted. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, and this petition in the above terms is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
